query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime street scene showing a no-parking sign with a circled letter R and the words "THIS BLOCK" mounted on a vertical pole in the right foreground. Behind the sign, a white transit bus with dark windows and printed text along its side is visible on the roadway. In the background, a building with illuminated windows and a leafless tree stands beneath a dark sky. The image is rendered in monochromatic brown tones.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime street scene captured with intentional motion blur and heavy film grain, creating a soft, hazy, archival texture throughout. A no-parking sign with a circled R and the words "THIS BLOCK" mounted on a pole dominates the right foreground in a casual, snapshot-style composition. Behind it, a white transit bus with dark windows and text along its side, as well as a building with illuminated windows and a bare tree, appear indistinct and softened. The muted, faded brown palette and dim lighting contribute to a melancholic, lo-fi atmosphere.
